title: polypodium vulgare var. obtusum
intro: Polypodium vulgare var. obtusum, also known as the common polypody or wall polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing blood sugar levels, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Polypodium vulgare var. obtusum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
